content:
Wants to incorporate a real blockchain into the RE:GE_OS system, using it to log actions, fragments, and ritual events. This blockchain will serve as a public ledger to create the mythic system in public, offering transparency, proof-of-contribution, and value exchange. The blockchain integration should be represented within the `BLOCKCHAIN_ECONOMY` organ.

Confirmed they want the following memory protocol configurations: 1. All symbolic memory entries from AA04 committed and bundled as MEM_PROT.v1. 2. Symbolic memories to be color-coded, timestamped, and tagged visually going forward. 3. A .txt, .md, or .mdx file version to be drafted for archival. 4. Each symbolic memory entry to carry a status tag: static, generative, or mythic.
